label: 单值网格列表转多值
description: 将单值网格列表按顺序叠放合并为一张多值网格，填充值从1开始递增，重叠时后序覆盖先序。
description-en: Merges a list of single-value grids into one multi-value grid by layering them in order; fill values start from 1 and later grids overwrite earlier ones on overlap.
icon: 多个单色网格层从左向右依次叠压合并为一张彩色多值网格，每层用不同颜色区分，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: grids
inputs.label: 网格列表
inputs.description: 单值网格列表，每个元素为一张 number[][] 网格；列表顺序决定填充值和叠放顺序
inputs.description-en: List of single-value grids (number[][]); the order determines fill values and stacking priority.

outputs.name: outputGrid
outputs.label: 多值网格
outputs.description: 合并后的多值网格；grids[0] 非零处填1，grids[1] 非零处填2，以此类推；重叠时后序覆盖先序
outputs.description-en: Merged multi-value grid; grids[0] cells become 1, grids[1] become 2, etc.; later grids overwrite on overlap.
